fields.name: User Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the user's name. If the user is required to present credentials when starting the client, this is the name that the user must present.

fields.name: Full Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the full name of the user.

fields.name: Reviewed
fields.tooltip: Specifies if an administrator has reviewed this new user. When a new user is created, this field is empty to indicate that the user must be set up.

fields.name: Users - To review
fields.tooltip: Specifies new users who have not yet been reviewed by an administrator.

fields.name: CDS Integration Errors
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of errors related to data integration.

fields.name: Coupled Data Synch Errors
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of errors that occurred in the latest synchronization of coupled data between Business Central and Dynamics 365 Sales.
